items.title: EU needs to delay social media access for children - von der Leyen
items.dek: She told an EU summit that an expert panel was due to come up with steps on how to protect minors online by July.
items.body: She told an EU summit that an expert panel was due to come up with steps on how to protect minors online by July.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Jim Caviezel Breaks Silence on Jeffrey Epstein Allegations
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
items.dek: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.body: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.author: IriLine Desk
